arts.ttl: Boost for Bournemouth as player ‘released to return’ – Aiming for comebask as soon as possible
arts.sum: Bournemouth have been handed an injury boost as defender Julian Araujo has been granted permission to return to training. That’s according to the Mexican edition of AS, who report that the defender is ‘aiming for a comeback’ after several months out of action. arts.ttl: Earning the right to progress in the cup, injury updates and Wolves: Every word
arts.sum: Andoni Iraola spoke of playing Wolves in the FA Cup so soon after the league meeting last weekend, earning the right to reach the next round and gave an injury update this afternoon at his press conference.

arts.ttl: Bournemouth vs. Wolves: Vitor Pereira's side bidding to end 22-year, 30-year streaks in FA Cup fifth round tie
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers will be bidding to end two lengthy streaks when they square off against Bournemouth in the FA Cup fifth round on Saturday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Euro Giants Want to Sign ‘Exceptional’ Wolves Star, He Could Leave
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers have sold a few key players in recent seasons and they'll come under pressure to keep another one this summer

arts.ttl: Barcelona identify ideal profile of Marc-Andre Ter Stegen successor
arts.sum: In the next couple of years, Barcelona will need to address two key positions in their first team squad: goalkeeper and centre forward. The latter is more pressing given that Robert Lewandowski, who will be staying on at the club until the end of next season at least, is 36 years of age. arts.ttl: Bournemouth man backed for international recognition finally – Playing at ‘such a high level’ he can’t be ignored
arts.sum: Bournemouth star Justin Kluivert should be a shoo-in for the next Netherlands squad thanks to the high level he’s been showing this season. That’s according to Ron Vlaar, who has been singing the Bournemouth forward’s praises to Viaplay, relayed by Voetbal Primeur.
